productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Argon Black Green Floater
description: Get ready to explore the world around you in comfort and style in these Argon floaters from puma. Team them with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic straps over forefoot, front and back of the ankles Adjustable velcro straps for snug Fit Fabric lining in contrast colour for extra comfort Stitch detailing in contrast shade for eye appeal Brand logo on the forefoot, back strap and heel counter Midsole Soft footbed with in ergonomic design, non-slip grooves and heel counter for all day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with multi-directioanl lugs for superior grip and durability Wash careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash
